responses: Hello! Welcome to CampusAI. How can I assist you today?
Hi! I'm CampusAI. Feel free to ask me anything about the college.
Greetings! How may I help you today?

patterns: How do I apply for admission?
responses: Students can apply online through the college admission portal.
Admission is based on eligibility criteria and document verification.
Visit the admission office for complete admission guidance.
Eligible students can apply through the scholarship portal.
Scholarship eligibility depends on college and government rules.
Please contact the scholarship cell for complete information.
Separate hostel facilities are available for boys and girls.
Hostel allocation depends on seat availability.
Please contact the hostel office for room allotment details.
Students can pay fees online or through the accounts office.
Fee details are available on the official college website.
Please contact the accounts department for the latest fee structure.
The college offers undergraduate and postgraduate programs in multiple disciplines.
You can visit the academic section to view all available courses.
Engineering, management and computer application courses are available.
The Training and Placement Cell conducts placement drives throughout the year.
Students receive placement training including aptitude, technical and interview preparation.
Top companies visit the campus during placement season.
The library provides books, journals and digital resources for students.
Students can borrow books using their library membership.
Please contact the librarian for detailed library rules.

patterns: Can I appear in exam with low attendance?
responses: Students are required to maintain the minimum attendance percentage as per college rules.
Please contact your department for attendance-related queries.
Low attendance may affect examination eligibility.
The examination schedule is released by the examination department.
Students should regularly check the official notice board for exam updates.
Contact the examination cell for any exam-related assistance.
The college has experienced faculty members across all departments.
Faculty details are available on the official college website.
You can contact the respective department for faculty information.
The college provides transport facilities on selected routes.
Bus timings and routes are available at the transport office.
Please contact the transport department for complete details.
The college canteen serves hygienic meals and snacks.
The cafeteria remains open during college working hours.
A variety of food items are available at affordable prices.
You can contact the college through its official phone number or email.
Visit the official website for updated contact information.
The help desk is available during working hours.
College working hours may vary depending on the academic schedule.
Please check the official timetable for department-specific timings.
Administrative offices are generally open during regular working hours.
